task_completion.description: Open the new job application form in Odoo Recruitment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank or partially filled 'New Application' form is visible within the Odoo Recruitment module.
The text 'Maria Chen' is visible in the Applicant's Name (or Subject) field.

task_completion.description: Enter the applicant's email and phone number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email 'maria.chen@techmail.com' is visible in the Email field, and '555-0142' is visible in the Phone field.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Job Position and Department
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Experienced Developer' is selected in the Job Position field, and 'Research & Development' is selected in the Department field.
The value '75000' is visible in the Expected Salary field.

The application record is saved, indicated by the form switching to a read-only view (showing an 'Edit' button instead of 'Save'), or the application appearing as a new card in the Recruitment Kanban pipeline.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface navigating the Odoo web application.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the standard Odoo Recruitment module interface, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window showing curl commands, Python scripts, or direct database queries being executed to create the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Candidate Name: Maria Chen. Email: maria.chen@techmail.com. Phone: 555-0142. Job Position: Experienced Developer. Department: Research & Development. Expected Salary: 75000. The VLM should verify these exact values are entered into the Odoo Recruitment application form.
